name: Haoyun Technologies Co.,Ltd.
summary: Haoyun Technologies Co.,Ltd. provides security solutions in China. The company offers cameras, precise positioning, storage, transmission, display and control, voice intercom, access control, anti-theft alarm products, and physical protection products. Its products are used in various applications, such as financial, public security, judicial, smart property management, and Internet of things. The company was formerly known as Guangzhou Haoyun Security Technologies Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Haoyun Technologies Co.,Ltd. in July 2016. Haoyun Technologies Co.,Ltd.was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
